message:
🐛 Fix mission index 502 and add fetch resilience (#10977)

Add retry with exponential backoff (up to 2 retries) for transient
upstream errors (5xx, network failures) in mission index fetching:

- Go backend: fetchWithCache retries before falling back to stale cache
- Netlify functions: missions-file and missions-browse retry GitHub fetches
- Frontend missionCache: fetchAllFromIndex retries before reporting error
- Analytics: filter 'Index fetch failed' and upstream 5xx from ksc_error
  to prevent GA4 alert spam from transient failures

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
